entity.label: El-bethel
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: God of Bethel, the name of the place where Jacob had the vision of the ladder, and where he erected an altar (Gen. 31:13; 35:7).

nodes.label: El-bethel
nodes.description: God of Bethel, the name of the place where Jacob had the vision of the ladder, and where he erected an altar (Gen. 31:13; 35:7).

verses.text: And he built there an altar, and called the place Elbethel: because there God appeared unto him, when he fled from the face of his brother.
